recommendations.title: A Quiet Life
recommendations.overview: The story of a man who murdered thirty-two people, gained power, and then got afraid because too many people wanted to kill him. One August morning, he disappeared. For fifteen years, everyone believed him dead.

recommendations.title: Alaska
recommendations.overview: Nadine is a French young woman. Fausto is an Italian young man trying to make it in Paris as a restaurant waiter. They accidentally meet at a five-star hotel. Both are fragile, alone and obsessed with the idea of an unattainable happiness. Their inte

recommendations.title: V/H/S/Beyond
recommendations.overview: The infinite playground of forbidden worlds and dangerous lifeforms offered by the sci-fi horror genre will lead to the biggest, maddest, bloodiest V/H/S ever.
recommendations.director: Justin Long, Kate Siegel, Justin Martinez, Jay Cheel, Virat Pal, Christian Long, Jordan Downey

recommendations.title: Lessons in Chocolate
recommendations.overview: Mattia, a building contractor on a promising career path, is about to close the biggest deal of his professional life, when his illegally-hired worker Kamal falls off some scaffolding, suffers a severe break and threatens to sue and press charges aga

recommendations.title: The Dark Tapes
recommendations.overview: A genre-defying mixture of horror, sci-fi, myth, mystery and thrills told as four interlocking tales in one intelligent anthology. Ghosts, spirits, creatures, demons and more from the paranormal world collide with rational curiosity.

recommendations.title: The Matrix Revisited
recommendations.overview: The film goes behind the scenes of the 1999 sci-fi movie The Matrix.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
recommendations.overview: An apocalyptic story set in the furthest reaches of our planet, in a stark desert landscape where humanity is broken, and most everyone is crazed fighting for the necessities of life. Within this world exist two rebels on the run who just might be ab

recommendations.title: Finch
recommendations.overview: On a post-apocalyptic Earth, a robot, built to protect the life of his dying creator's beloved dog, learns about life, love, friendship, and what it means to be human.

recommendations.title: Creepozoids
recommendations.overview: Five Army deserters wander the post-apocalyptic, post-industrial LA landscape seeking shelter from an increasingly toxic environment and poisonous rain.
